# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "chart.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "chart.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount | default 1 }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "chart.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "chart.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
      annotations:
        rollme: {{ randAlphaNum 5 | quote }}
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: {{ .Values.securityContext.runAsUser | default 65534 }}
        runAsGroup: {{ .Values.securityContext.runAsGroup | default 65534 }}
        fsGroup: {{ .Values.securityContext.fsGroup | default 65534 }}
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      {{- if .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml .Values.imagePullSecrets | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      serviceAccountName: {{ include "chart.serviceAccountName" . }}
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion }}"
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: {{ .Values.containerSecurityContext.runAsUser | default 65534 }}
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.service.targetPort | default 8080 }}
              protocol: TCP
          {{- if .Values.healthCheck.enabled | default true }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.healthCheck.livenessPath | default "/healthz" }}
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.healthCheck.livenessInitialDelay | default 15 }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.healthCheck.livenessPeriod | default 20 }}
            timeoutSeconds: {{ .Values.healthCheck.livenessTimeout | default 5 }}
            failureThreshold: {{ .Values.healthCheck.livenessFailureThreshold | default 3 }}
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ .Values.healthCheck.readinessPath | default "/readyz" }}
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.healthCheck.readinessInitialDelay | default 5 }}
            periodSeconds: {{ .Values.healthCheck.readinessPeriod | default 10 }}
            timeoutSeconds: {{ .Values.healthCheck.readinessTimeout | default 3 }}
            failureThreshold: {{ .Values.healthCheck.readinessFailureThreshold | default 3 }}
          {{- end }}
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: {{ .Values.resources.limits.cpu | default "500m" }}
              memory: {{ .Values.resources.limits.memory | default "256Mi" }}
              {{- if .Values.resources.limits.ephemeralStorage }}
              ephemeral-storage: {{ .Values.resources.limits.ephemeralStorage }}
              {{- end }}
            requests:
              cpu: {{ .Values.resources.requests.cpu | default "100m" }}
              memory: {{ .Values.resources.requests.memory | default "128Mi" }}
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            {{- if .Values.extraVolumeMounts }}
            {{- toYaml .Values.extraVolumeMounts | nindent 12 }}
            {{- end }}
          {{- if .Values.env }}
          env:
            {{- range .Values.env }}
            - name: {{ .name }}
              {{- if .valueFrom }}
              valueFrom:
                {{- toYaml .valueFrom | nindent 16 }}
              {{- else }}
              value: {{ .value | quote }}
              {{- end }}
            {{- end }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if .Values.envFrom }}
          envFrom:
            {{- toYaml .Values.envFrom | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: {{ .Values.tmpVolumeSizeLimit | default "64Mi" }}
        {{- if .Values.extraVolumes }}
        {{- toYaml .Values.extraVolumes | nindent 8 }}
        {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.topologySpreadConstraints }}
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
